title: run: only set up /etc/hosts or /etc/resolv.conf with network
body: Only set up bind mounts of copies of the host's `/etc/hosts` and `/etc/resolv.conf` files if we're setting up networking.  Should resolve #1142.

comments.body: Change LGTM, just wondering if we should toggle based on --net=none type of param from the user.
